title: Add Admin Management UI for Owner Role

requirements.summary: Add 'Manage Admins' section to Admin Dashboard for owner-role users to grant admin privileges by principal ID
acceptanceCriteria: The 'Manage Admins' section is visible in the Admin Dashboard only when the logged-in user has owner role.
The owner can enter a principal ID and click 'Grant Admin Role' to elevate that principal to admin.
A success message is displayed when the role is granted successfully.
An error message is displayed if the operation fails or if the actor is not available.
The form input is cleared after a successful grant.

file_operations.description: Add a new mutation hook `useGrantAdminRole` that calls the backend `grantAdminRole` function with a principal parameter. The hook should use useMutation from TanStack Query and accept a Principal as input. Return the mutation object with success/error states for use in the UI.

Add a 'Manage Admins' section below the existing admin controls that is conditionally rendered only when the current user's role equals UserRole.admin (which represents owner in the authorization component). Include a form with a text input for principal ID, a 'Grant Admin Role' button, and success/error message displays using state. Wire the form submission to call the useGrantAdminRole mutation hook. Clear the input field after successful grant. Add a helper note explaining that the principal ID must be obtained from the user's Internet Identity login session. Import Principal from '@dfinity/principal' to validate and convert the text input to a Principal object before calling the mutation.
